assignmentsTab.thisPolicyHasNoOrganizationSoAssignment: This política has no organization, so assignment destinos cannot be listed.

assignmentsTab.anOrganizationPolicyAlwaysTargetsItsOwn: An organization política always targets its own organization. Pick a narrower level (site, dispositivo group, dispositivo) to scope it further.

backupTab.aWSS3MinIOWasabiBackblazeB2: AWS S3, MinIO, Wasabi, Backblaze B2

backupTab.allDiscoveredDatabasesAreBackedUpAutomat: Todos discovered databases are backed up automatically. Exclude specific ones abaixo.
backupTab.backupsAreStoredInTheConfiguredStorage2: Backups are stored in the configurado storage destination. The agent stages files locally e uploads automatically.

backupTab.forMinIOWasabiBackblazeB2Etc: For MinIO, Wasabi, Backblaze B2, etc.
backupTab.localDiskPathMountedNASOrUNC: Local disk path, mounted NAS, ou UNC network share. Path must be accessible por the agent.
backupTab.directoriesAndFilesToIncludeInBackups: Directories e files para include in backups. Agents back up these paths on each assigned dispositivo.
backupTab.globPatternsToSkipDuringBackupClick: Glob patterns para skip during backup. Click a common pattern para add it.
backupTab.keepLongerRunningRestorePointsForGrandfa: Keep longer-em execução restore points para grandfather-father-son retention.
backupTab.theseSettingsStampFutureSnapshotsAtCreat: These configurações stamp future snapshots at creation time. Legal hold merges conservatively across applicable backup policies, e the longest immutability window wins. Application protection is enforced por Breeze cleanup jobs unless provider-enforced WORM is explicitly verified.
backupTab.providerImmutabilityIsConfiguredButTheSe: Provider immutability is configurado, but the selecionados storage config does not currently have verified object lock support.
backupTab.applicationLevelProtectionBlocksDeletion: Application-level protection blocks deletion in Breeze cleanup jobs. Provider-enforced WORM requires an S3 config com verified object lock support e still re-validates at snapshot time.
backupTab.leaveBlankToAllowBackupsAtAny: Leave blank para allow backups at any time de dia.
backupTab.configNameIsRequired: O nome da configuração é obrigatório
backupTab.s3BucketNameIsRequired: O nome do bucket S3 é obrigatório
backupTab.backupPathIsRequired: O caminho de backup é obrigatório
backupTab.pleaseSelectOrCreateABackupConfiguration: Selecione ou crie uma configuração de backup
backupTab.providerImmutabilityCannotBeSavedUntilOb: Provider immutability cannot be saved until object lock support is verified. Retest the config or save with application protection.
backupTab.preventRetentionCleanupFromDeletingFutur: Prevent retention cleanup from deleting future snapshots until an operator explicitly releases the hold.

complianceTab.notifyUsersAndLogComplianceWarnings: Notify users e log conformidade warnings.

eventLogTab.eventLogsAreCollectedFromAllDevices: Os logs de eventos são coletados de todos os dispositivos por padrão. Estas configurações ajustam o que é coletado, com que frequência e por quanto tempo é retido — elas não ativam nem desativam a coleta.
eventLogTab.howLongToKeepEventLogs7: How long para keep event logs (7-365 dias).
eventLogTab.eventsBelowThisLevelAreFilteredOut: Events abaixo this level are filtered out.
eventLogTab.howOftenTheAgentSendsLogs1: How often the agent sends logs (1-60 minutos).

patchTab.rebootOnlyWhenThePatchRequiresIt: Reboot only quando the patch requires it.
patchTab.onlyRebootDuringAScheduledMaintenanceWin: Only reboot during a scheduled maintenance window.
patchTab.selectWhichUpdateRingGovernsPatchApprova: Selecionar which update ring governs patch approvals para this política. Leave empty para manual-only approvals.
patchTab.whenApprovedPatchesAreInstalledOnDevices: When approved patches are installed on dispositivos.
patchTab.manageWindowsUpdateExclusivelyThroughBre: Manage Windows Update exclusively through Breeze
patchTab.suppressesTheEndpointSNativeWindowsUpdat: Suppresses the endpoint's native Windows Update automatic-install channel so updates only flow through Breeze's approval rings — preventing unexpected reboots e patches outside your schedule. Windows-only; Breeze's own scan/approve/install path is unaffected. Reverts cleanly quando disabled (a pre-existing admin Group Política is left untouched).

remoteAccessTab.numberOfSimultaneousTunnelConnectionsAll: Number de simultaneous tunnel connections allowed (1-20).
remoteAccessTab.disconnectAfterThisManyMinutesOfInactivi: Disconnect após this many minutos de inactivity.
remoteAccessTab.forceDisconnectAfterThisDurationRegardle: Force disconnect após this duration regardless de activity.
remoteAccessTab.portsPermittedForProxyTunnelingEnterA: Ports permitted para proxy tunneling. Enter a port number (1-65535).
remoteAccessTab.allowTheBreezeViewerToConnectTo: Allow the Breeze Viewer to connect to this dispositivo via the Connect Remote Desktop action (WebRTC).
remoteAccessTab.allowBrowserBasedVNCConnectionsToReach: Allow browser-based VNC connections to reach the login window on older Macs. The agent will enable macOS Screen Sharing on demand when a tunnel opens.
remoteAccessTab.allowRemoteProcessManagerServicesRegistr: Allow remote process manager, services, registry, terminal, and file browser.
remoteAccessTab.streamTheRemoteMachineSClipboardTo: Stream the remote machine's clipboard to the operator's viewer. This is the data-egress direction — whatever the end user copies (passwords, MFA codes, secrets) reaches the operator. Off by default on hosted Breeze.
remoteAccessTab.allowTheOperatorToPasteTheirLocal: Allow the operator to paste their local clipboard into the remote machine. Operator-initiated and lower risk.
remoteAccessTab.allowTunnelingNetworkTrafficThroughEnrol: Allow tunneling network traffic through enrolled agents.
remoteAccessTab.automaticallyEnableProxyCapabilityWhenNe: Automatically enable proxy capability when new dispositivos are discovered.

softwarePolicyTab.executableRulesInThisPolicyAlsoGate: Executable regras in this política also gate UAC elevation requests on assigned dispositivos — an allowlist match auto-approves, a blocklist match auto-denies, antes any PAM regras run.

vulnerabilityTab.correlateThisScopeSInstalledSoftwareAnd: Correlate this scope's installed software e OS versions against the CVE catalog (MSRC, NVD, Apple) para surface vulnerabilities on the dispositivo e fleet dashboards. warrantyTab.warrantyAlertingIsOptInDevicesWith: Warranty alerting is opt-in: dispositivos com no warranty política assigned never alert. Thresholds abaixo apply para fixed-term coverage only — active AppleCare subscriptions renew rather than expire, so their expiry alerts are always suppressed.
warrantyTab.generateAlertsWhenFixedTermDeviceWarrant: Generate alerts quando fixed-term dispositivo warranties are approaching expiry.
warrantyTab.generateAWarningAlertWhenWarrantyExpires: Generate a warning alert quando warranty expires dentro de this many dias.
warrantyTab.generateACriticalAlertWhenWarrantyExpire: Generate a critical alert quando warranty expires dentro de this many dias.
